content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff`/`git diff origin/master..HEAD` and read the changed implementation files end-to-end (`src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`, and `tests/unit/prompt_builder_test.rs`). No actionable correctness, safety, or robustness findings were identified in this bead's changes. `cargo test --quiet` passed; `nix build` still fails in 5 pre-existing `ps`-dependent tests outside this change set.

## Amendments

None.
